rationale: The cited paper appears only in grouped literature citations, mainly to support broad claims about self-construal research (e.g., malleability of self-construal interventions and holistic vs. analytic processing mechanisms). The citing article does not discuss Ng and Houston (2009) specifically, does not derive hypotheses from its findings, and does not reuse its methods or measures. Its role is background positioning within a larger citation set rather than a distinct conceptual or empirical building block.
